entity.description: OpenAI is an American artificial intelligence (AI) organization consisting of the non-profit OpenAI, Inc. registered in Delaware and its for-profit subsidiary corporation OpenAI Global, LLC. OpenAI researches artificial intelligence with the declared intention of developing "safe and beneficial" artificial general intelligence, which it defines as "highly autonomous systems that outperform humans at most economically valuable work".

allDescriptions: OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company dedicated to ensuring that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity. AI is an extremely powerful tool that must be created with safety and human needs at its core. OpenAI is dedicated to putting that alignment of interests first - ahead of profit.

OpenAI Global, LLC operates as an AI research and deployment company. The Company develops a platform that provides shopping research, group chats, measuring performance, and language models for business and developers. OpenAI Global serves customers worldwide.
OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company that develops advanced AI models, including ChatGPT.

OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company that conducts research and implements machine learning. The research organization is dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence safely and beneficially. OpenAI aims to advance artificial general intelligence (AGI) that is safe, beneficial, and aligned with human values. The company focuses on creating AI systems that are capable of performing a wide range of tasks and learning autonomously from diverse data.
We provide modern data intelligence apps for your business processes across regulated industries

OpenEnterprise.AI is a tech startup in its early stages that aims to eliminate data silos within highly regulated industries through the use of AI and machine learning. Our solution provides data intelligence for industry applications and covers end-to-end business processes, helping companies implement digital process mining and digital process twins.

OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company dedicated to ensuring that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity. AI is an extremely powerful tool that must be created with safety and human needs at its core. OpenAI is dedicated to putting that alignment of interests first — ahead of profit.
American artificial intelligence research organization

OpenAI is an American artificial intelligence (AI) research organization headquartered in San Francisco, consisting of OpenAI Group PBC, a for-profit public benefit corporation (PBC), partially controlled by OpenAI Foundation, a nonprofit. OpenAI developed the generative pre-trained transformer (GPT) family of large language models, the DALL-E series of text-to-image models, and the Sora series of text-to-video models, which have influenced industry research and commercial applications. Its release of ChatGPT in November 2022 has been credited with catalyzing the AI boom, and widespread interest in generative AI.
Artificial intelligence company, for-profit subsidiary of OpenAI Incorporated
Holding company
US holding company
Artificial intelligence company, onwer and operator of ChatGPT, ChatGPT Enterprise and OpenAI’s API tools

OpenAI's mission is to build safe AGI, and ensure AGI's benefits are as widely and evenly distributed as possible. They expect AI technologies to be hugely impactful in the short term, but their impact will be outstripped by that of the first AGIs.
OpenAIs mission is to ensure that artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity.
Research Services
Computer Software in San Francisco, CA.

OPENAI, INC. is located in San Francisco, California. This organization primarily operates in the Biotechnical Research, Noncommercial business / industry within the Engineering, Accounting, Research, and Management Services sector. This organization has been operating for approximately 2 years. OPENAI, INC. is estimated to generate $30,640 in annual revenues, and employs approximately 1 people at this single location.

OpenAI is a technology company founded in 2015 that develops advanced artificial intelligence systems and software. The company focuses on creating and deploying artificial general intelligence (AGI) in a safe and beneficial manner. OpenAI produces various AI products and research tools including large language models and other machine learning technologies. The company maintains a charter that outlines its commitment to ensuring AI technologies benefit humanity broadly rather than serving narrow interests. OpenAI operates globally with a significant presence in North America and other regions, offering both business-to-business and consumer-facing AI solutions through its website and mobile applications.

OPENAI, INC. is located in San Francisco, California. This organization primarily operates in the Biotechnical Research, Noncommercial business / industry within the Engineering, Accounting, Research, and Management Services sector. This organization has been operating for approximately 6 years. OPENAI, INC. is estimated to generate $6.0 million in annual revenues, and employs approximately 46 people at this single location.

About OpenAI is an AI research company, discovering and enacting the path to safe artificial general intelligence. Additional Information OpenAI is an AI research company, discovering and enacting the path to safe artificial general intelligence.
OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company that conducts research and implements machine learning.

OpenAI, Inc. operates as an investment company. The Company focuses on investments in early-stage artificial intelligence startups with focuses on health care, climate change, and education sectors. OpenAI serves customers worldwide.

OpenAI’s mission is to ensure that artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity. We’re a team of a hundred people based in San Francisco, California. The OpenAI Charter describes the principles that guide us as we execute on our mission.
